zh.Bridstow, Herefordshire Unitary Authorit: 英國英格蘭賀福爾布利德斯托福
zh.Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, E: 英國英格蘭倫敦聖 波托爾福 維特 阿爾蓋特
zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charlotte Neives是Neives的女兒，於1503年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾。她於1527年與John James Higgins在英國英格蘭賀福爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1594年1月10日在她的家鄉享年91歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 波托爾福 維特 阿爾蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charlotte Neives是Neives的女儿，于1503年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾。她于1527年与John James Higgins在英国英格兰賀福爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1594年1月10日在她的家乡享年91岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 波托爾福 維特 阿爾蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Neives
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Miguel, Carlos, Juan, Angel, Rafael, Francisco, Jesus, Luz, Manuel, Ramon.

Spanish: from a short form of the Marian title and name María de las Nieves ‘Mary of the Snows’, given particularly to children born on 5 August, on which date the Virgin allegedly once caused it to snow in Rome. The surname may also be a reference to a local church dedicated to the Virgin Mary bearing this title.
Spanish: possibly also a nickname from the plural of nieve ‘snow’, for someone with snow-white hair.

variants.name: Neves
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Luis, Fernando, Gilberto, Mario, Ricardo, Augusto, Horacio, Joaquin.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Agostinho, Catarina, Manoel, Paulo.
Portugese: from a short form of the Marian title and name Maria das Neves ‘Mary of the Snows’ (see Nieves ).
Galician and Asturian-Leonese: habitational name from any of the places called Neves in the provinces of Pontevedra, Lugo, and A Coruña (all three in Galicia), and Asturias.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Charlotte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine diminutive of   Charles  , used in England since the 17th century. It was particulary popular in the 18th and 19th centuries, in part due to the influence of firstly  Queen Charlotte  (  1744–1818 ), wife of  George III , and secondly the novelist  Charlotte Brontë  (  1816–55 ); it has again come to prominence since the 1980s, especially in England and Australia.

variants.name: Charlotta
meanings: feminine diminutive of   Charles  , used in England since the 17th century. It was particulary popular in the 18th and 19th centuries, in part due to the influence of firstly  Queen Charlotte  (  1744–1818 ), wife of  George III , and secondly the novelist  Charlotte Brontë  (  1816–55 ); it has again come to prominence since the 1980s, especially in England and Australia.

variants.name: Charlette
meanings: feminine diminutive of   Charles  , used in England since the 17th century. It was particulary popular in the 18th and 19th centuries, in part due to the influence of firstly  Queen Charlotte  (  1744–1818 ), wife of  George III , and secondly the novelist  Charlotte Brontë  (  1816–55 ); it has again come to prominence since the 1980s, especially in England and Australia.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charlotte Neives was born in 1503, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Neives. She married John James Higgins in 1527, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 10 January 1594, in her hometown, at the age of 91, and was buried in Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charlotte Neives est née en 1503, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Neives. Elle a épousé John James Higgins en 1527, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 janvier 1594, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Botolph without Aldgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charlotte Neivesは1503年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでNeivesの娘として生まれた。1527年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでJohn James Higginsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1594年1月10日に故郷で91歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンサイント ボトルフ ウィソウト アルドガトにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, E: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프 위토우트 알드가트
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charlotte Neives(은)는 1503년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 Neives의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1527년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 John James Higgins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1594년 1월 10일 그녀의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프 위토우트 알드가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charlotte Neives nasceu em 1503, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Neives. Ela casou-se com John James Higgins em 1527, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1594, em sua cidade natal, com 91 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Botolph without Aldgate, London, E: сеинт ботолф витоут алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Charlotte Neives родилась в 1503 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Neives. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John James Higgins в 1527 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 января 1594 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности сеинт ботолф витоут алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
